home.title: Home
home.getStartedDesc: Browse, download, and launch any version from the Library.

config.title: Config
config.noCustom: No custom components yet. Import your own backends or gameservers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar and used as your in-game display name.
settings.accountIdHint: Unique identifier for your account. Used for tracking and debugging. Cannot be changed.
settings.installDirHint: All game versions will be downloaded to subdirectories inside this folder.
settings.installDirWarning: Set an install directory to enable downloads and launching.
settings.groupFormatHint: Choose how season groups appear in the Library.
settings.exportHint: Exports your settings, favourites, network config, and preferences as a JSON file.
settings.aboutDesc: Universal Fortnite version manager. Built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript.
settings.credits: This project relies on open source tools and components maintained by the community. Thank you to all the developers and contributors who make projects like this possible.
settings.updateNotConfigured: Update server not configured. Set endpoints and pubkey in tauri.conf.json (see BUILD.md).

setup.welcomeSub: Let's get you set up in under a minute.
setup.welcomeDesc: Apex helps you download, manage, and launch any Fortnite version from OT6.5 to the latest builds.
setup.installDirSub: Where should game versions be saved?
setup.installDirHint: All versions will download into subdirectories here. You can change this later in Settings.
setup.componentsSub: Download the tools needed to run games.
setup.allSetDesc: Head to the Library to browse and download versions, or check out Config to fine-tune your setup.

detail.mayNotWork: May not work on all setups
detail.notePlaceholder: Add a personal note about this build...

mirror.title: Download
mirror.noMirrorsHint: Try refreshing the link cache (GitHub README scrape), or the build may be missing from the archive.
